hero.title: About Physio-Raise
hero.description: Excellence in physical therapy and rehabilitation care, led by Dr. Mostafa Ezzat

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower individuals to achieve optimal physical health through personalized, evidence-based rehabilitation that addresses not just symptoms, but the root causes of physical dysfunction. We are committed to delivering compassionate care that transforms lives and restores hope.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading physical therapy center in Egypt, recognized for clinical excellence, innovative treatment approaches, and exceptional patient outcomes that set new standards in rehabilitation care.

values.title: Patient-Centered Care
values.description: Every treatment plan is personalized to your unique condition and recovery goals

values.title: Clinical Excellence
values.description: Evidence-based therapeutic protocols combined with years of professional expertise

values.title: Measurable Results
values.description: We track progress and adjust treatment to ensure continuous improvement

values.title: Comprehensive Support
values.description: Our team collaborates to provide holistic care for your complete recovery

recoverySteps.title: Initial Assessment
recoverySteps.description: Comprehensive evaluation of your condition, medical history, and recovery goals

recoverySteps.title: Diagnosis & Planning
recoverySteps.description: Expert analysis and creation of a personalized treatment roadmap

recoverySteps.title: Therapy Sessions
recoverySteps.description: Evidence-based therapeutic interventions with progress monitoring

recoverySteps.title: Recovery & Follow-up
recoverySteps.description: Long-term support to ensure sustained improvement and prevent relapse

achievements.title: Years Experience
achievements.description: Over a decade of clinical expertise
